subcodes.first_line: In this day the fire of the Divine Lote-Tree blazeth forth, and the Light of Oneness dawneth and shineth from the horizon of God's Will. How glorious [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز نار سدره رحمانیه مشتعل و نور احدیه از افق اراده ربانیه مشرق و لائح نیکوست
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @chastisement and requital
